data: {"generalSituation":"The trough of low pressure now affecting Guangdong will weaken gradually on Saturday. Showers will ease off over the region. It will be hot during the day. Under the influence of an easterly airstream and upper-air disturbances, there will be a few showers over the coast of southern China early next week. Another trough of low pressure will bring unsettled weather to the region in the middle and latter parts of next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260418","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"Light winds force 2.","forecastWeather":"Sunny intervals and one or two showers.
